Item 6
ITEM 6. SELECTED FINANCIAL DATA
FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS
(a)
GitHub has been included in our consolidated results of operations starting on the October 25, 2018 acquisition date.
(b)
Includes a [SALARY].6 billion net income tax benefit related to intangible property transfers and a [SALARY] million net charge related to the enactment of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (“TCJA”), which together increased net income and diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) by [SALARY].4 billion and [SALARY], respectively. Refer to Note 12 - Income Taxes of the Notes to Financial Statements (Part II, Item 8 of this Form 10-K) for further discussion.
(c)
Includes a [SALARY].7 billion net charge related to the enactment of the TCJA, which decreased net income and diluted EPS by [SALARY].7 billion and [SALARY], respectively. Refer to Note 12 - Income Taxes of the Notes to Financial Statements (Part II, Item 8 of this Form 10-K) for further discussion.
(d)
Reflects the impact of the adoption of new accounting standards in [DATE_TIME] related to revenue recognition and leases.
(e)
LinkedIn has been included in our consolidated results of operations starting on the [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME] acquisition date.
(f)
Includes [SALARY] million of employee severance expenses primarily related to our sales and marketing restructuring plan, which decreased operating income, net income, and diluted EPS by [SALARY] million, [SALARY] million, and [SALARY], respectively.
(g)
Includes [SALARY] million of asset impairment charges related to our Phone business and [SALARY] million of restructuring charges associated with our Phone business restructuring plans, which together decreased operating income, net income, and diluted EPS by [SALARY].1 billion, [SALARY] million, and [SALARY], respectively.
PART II
